nasb.text: But Saul began ravaging the church, entering house after house, and dragging off men and women, he would put them in prison.

esv.text: But Saul was ravaging the church, and entering house after house, he dragged off men and women and committed them to prison.

cnv.text: 掃羅卻殘害教會，逐家進去，連男帶女拉去坐監。

ccb.text: 扫罗却在摧毁教会，他挨家挨户搜寻，把男女信徒抓进监里。

csbs.text: 扫罗却摧残教会，闯进各家各户，无论男女都拉去关进监狱。
